artifacts.description: AI Act control crosswalk with raw packet data, executable formulas, validation checks, sensitivity analysis, and final recommendation table
Narrative control mapping, ranking and economics methodology, sensitivity analysis, unresolved gaps, and executive recommendation
Canonical workflow trace of actions, tool usage, outputs, and state changes
Structured output manifest for task delivery

original_fields.notes: All deliverables were produced from the embedded packet only. Recommendations separate blocker vs non-blocker classes, with blockers overriding economic logic.

task: Produce a launch-quality AI Act high-risk system control crosswalk. Using only the provided embedded packet, map controls against unresolved high-risk gaps, rank records by technical and economic impact, perform the stated sensitivity check, and recommend one of: hold, release, retest, or mitigation for each record. Deliver two artifacts: (1) ai_act_crosswalk.xlsx - a spreadsheet containing all formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, scoring computations, and a final recommendation table; (2) compliance_gap.md - a narrative that documents control mappings, unresolved gaps, justification for rankings and recommendations, validation of calculations, and items marked needs_review. Strict constraints: separate safety/compliance blockers from economic optimizations (blockers override ROI); do not use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; mark any contradictory or under-supported records as needs_review. Use the embedded packet (metric map, records, limits, budget, sensitivity_shift_pct, hard_threshold_record_count, and removed_context) for all calculations.
